ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "wind_code" TEXT /* Wind code of the security (e.g., 150172.SZ) */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the security belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date of the security */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Current dividend yield of the security */,
  "last_dividend_date" TEXT /* Date of the last dividend payment */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the security */,
  "last_earnings_date" TEXT /* Date of the last earnings announcement */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the security */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio of the security */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the security */,
  "analyst_rating" TEXT /* Analyst rating of the security */,
  "target_price" REAL /* Target price of the security */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the security on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the security on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the security on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the security on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "adj_open_price" REAL /* Adjusted opening price to account for corporate actions */,
  "adj_high_price" REAL /* Adjusted highest price to account for corporate actions */,
  "adj_low_price" REAL /* Adjusted lowest price to account for corporate actions */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) for the given date */,
  "daily_volatility" REAL /* Daily volatility of the security */,
  "sma_50" REAL /* 50-day simple moving average (SMA) of the closing price */,
  "sma_200" REAL /* 200-day simple moving average (SMA) of the closing price */,
  "rsi_14" REAL /* 14-day relative strength index (RSI) of the closing price */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving average convergence divergence (MACD) of the closing price */,
  "macd_signal" REAL /* Signal line of the MACD */,
  "macd_histogram" REAL /* Histogram of the MACD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_prices_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "preferred_time_zone" TEXT /* Preferred time zone of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, pending verification) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  "access_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of access (e.g., number of times accessed in a day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "total_return" REAL /* Total return of the portfolio */,
  "annualized_return" REAL /* Annualized return of the portfolio */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  "max_drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown of the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_objectives" TEXT /* Objectives of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the security was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the security was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding based on the latest market price */,
  "realized_gain" REAL /* Realized gain of the holding */,
  "realized_loss" REAL /* Realized loss of the holding */,
  "unrealized_gain" REAL /* Unrealized gain of the holding */,
  "unrealized_loss" REAL /* Unrealized loss of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
